name: retrieve() with 50ms timeout fires TimeoutError; withRetry does NOT retry on TimeoutError
description: Validates the withTimeout + withRetry composition added to retrieval.js (PHASE-9 Item 1). A mock _client is injected whose embeddings.create increments a call counter then delays 200ms (>> 50ms budget). retrieve() is called with timeoutMs:50. Expected: TimeoutError is thrown at ~50ms (throws_timeout_error), the error message includes '50' (error_message_includes_50ms), the mock was called exactly once (attempt_count_equals_1 — withRetry does NOT retry on TimeoutError), and the error class name is TimeoutError (error_is_timeout_type). No openStore call is attempted because the timeout fires before the vector search step.
